caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT!" and a black baseball cap with a logo sits in a podcast studio. He wears over-ear headphones and gold jewelry, including a chain and a bracelet. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. The background features a white wall with a logo that reads "BOSS HUSTLE" accompanied by five stars, and a screen displaying the text "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics include a logo that says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing. In the second frame, he raises his right hand to emphasize a point. He maintains a consistent posture and focused expression while looking slightly off-camera to his right across all frames.
